item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves after hours: Costco, Marvell Technology, Gap & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in extended trading.

item.title: Mortgages in 47 seconds: Better’s new ChatGPT app targets lenders Rocket and UWM
item.description: Creating a mortgage has been one of the most time-consuming corners of American finance, with lenders relying on dozens of steps that can take weeks.

item.title: States led by New York sue to block Trump's latest tariffs, calling them an illegal end run around Supreme Court
item.description: The move from the state AGs — part of the successful effort to block Trump's original tariffs — adds to the ongoing uncertainty created by his tariff ...

item.title: Oaktree's Howard Marks says there's no systemic problem with private credit
item.description: Marks said any risk stems from the pace of expansion in direct lending, which has ballooned to a market now exceeding $1 trillion since inception arou...

item.title: New Berkshire Hathaway CEO still talks with Warren Buffett nearly every day
item.description: Buffett remains chairman of the sprawling, Omaha, Nebraska-based conglomerate and continues to regularly come into the office, Abel said.
